title: KZ-1 runners skeleton repair
objective:
Run script:"""
base = Path('governance/runners')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
manifest = []
for i in range(1, 15):
    name = f'kz1_runner_{i:02d}.py'
    path = base / name
    text = f'''#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""KZ-1 deterministic runner skeleton {i:02d}."""

RUNNER_ID = "kz1_runner_{i:02d}"


def run():
    return {{"runner": RUNNER_ID, "status": "ok", "release_pass": False}}


def main():
    result = run()
    print(result)
    return 0


if __name__ == "__main__":
    raise SystemExit(main())
'''
    path.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(path))
    manifest.append(str(path))
init = base / '__init__.py'
if not init.exists():
    init.write_text('"""Governance runner skeleton package."""\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(init))
state = Path('governance/state/KZ1_RUNNERS_SKELETON_REPAIR.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'KZ-1','trace_id':'kz1_runners_skeleton_repair','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'runner_count':14,'runners':manifest,'workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'KZ-1B runner skeleton validation'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/KZ1_RUNNERS_SKELETON_REPAIR.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# KZ-1 | Runners skeleton repair\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nCreated 14 deterministic runnable Python runner skeletons under governance/runners. No .github/workflows files were touched.\n\nNext: KZ-1B runner skeleton validation.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
if ctx.exists():
    ctx.write_text(ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8').rstrip() + '\n## KZ-1 completed | 2026-06-04\nCreated 14 deterministic runnable Python runner skeletons under governance/runners. Workflow lock respected: no .github/workflows files touched. Release PASS false pending validation. Next: KZ-1B runner skeleton validation.\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(ctx))
"""No issue comments.
